src/main/java/it/pagopa/ecommerce/common.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.3+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
src/main/java/it/pagopa/ecommerce/common.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3 deprecates @Configuration for auto-configuration classes in favor of @AutoConfiguration to enable non-lazy proxying and improve startup performance; while not strictly a compile error yet, it is a required migration step for the target framework version to avoid deprecation warnings and align with new best practices.

src/main/java/it/pagopa/ecommerce/common.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/it/pagopa/ecommerce/common.why_exists: javax.validation package is not available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments required by Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compile error.
